testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Comments: Tab Structure edit.php shows Comments tab button
OpenSparrow – Comments: Tab Structure clicking Comments tab activates it
OpenSparrow – Comments: Tab Structure Comments panel #c-panel renders after tab click
testcase.classname: Comments panel #c-panel renders after tab click

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Comments: Tab Structure Comments panel has thread container
OpenSparrow – Comments: Tab Structure thread shows messages or empty state after load
testcase.classname: thread shows messages or empty state after load

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Comments: Tab Structure editor role: textarea and send button present
testcase.classname: editor role: textarea and send button present

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Comments: Add Comment typing in textarea updates its value
testcase.classname: typing in textarea updates its value

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Comments: Add Comment send button not disabled when textarea has content
testcase.classname: send button not disabled when textarea has content

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Comments: Add Comment submitting comment appends .c-msg to thread and clears input
testcase.classname: submitting comment appends .c-msg to thread and clears input

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Comments: Add Comment Ctrl+Enter posts comment
OpenSparrow – Comments: Delete Comment cancelling delete confirm keeps message intact
testcase.classname: cancelling delete confirm keeps message intact

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Comments: Delete Comment confirming delete adds .c-msg-deleted to message
OpenSparrow – Comments: Delete Comment deleted message hides delete button
OpenSparrow – Comments: API Integration activating Comments tab triggers GET to api/comments.php
testcase.classname: activating Comments tab triggers GET to api/comments.php

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Comments: API Integration posting comment triggers POST to api/comments.php
testcase.classname: posting comment triggers POST to api/comments.php
